parts.description: النواة العامة، الإصدارات، التحديث، المصادقة والدوال المساعدة الأساسية
App cache/update stability helpers for cache clearing, no-store update checks, refresh URLs and self-checks
Safe generic utilities/helpers for escaping, money formatting, IDs, phone normalization and file reading wrappers
Safe Excel/CSV import-export helpers, CSV builder/downloader and delimited text parser wrappers
Safe item helpers for categories, duplicate checks, item lookup, code/OCR helpers and selected item utilities
Safe customer catalog helpers for catalog state, cart totals, item visibility, search, sorting and pagination
Safe reports helpers for snapshots, totals, low stock, search text, export button binding and business report text
Full runtime smoke stabilization including update/cache, settings, messages, payments and extracted helper self-checks
Safe dialogs, messages, toasts and confirmation wrappers
Safe Android bridge helpers using HesabiAndroid
تهيئة Firebase والمستمعات اللحظية والبيانات العامة
Settings page stabilization helpers for tabs, safe action binding, update/cache/security shortcuts and self-checks
Messages page stabilization helpers for safe message normalization, customer selector, rows rendering, send button binding and self-checks
Payments page stabilization helpers for safe payment normalization, status filters, summary stats, rows rendering, action binding and self-checks
Invoices page stabilization helpers for safe invoice normalization, filters, summary stats, rows rendering, share button binding and self-checks
Statements page stabilization helpers for safe ledger normalization, debit/credit summaries, customer filters, rows rendering, action binding and self-checks
Returns page stabilization helpers for safe return normalization, request form fallback, status filters, summary stats, rows rendering, action binding and self-checks
Schedules page stabilization helpers for safe installments, due/overdue filters, summary stats, rows rendering, action binding and self-checks
Notifications and Android badge stabilization helpers for safe counters, unread notification rows, badge detail text, action binding and self-checks
Owner console and subscription settings stabilization helpers for safe owner metrics, users, shops, controls, subscription forms and self-checks
Permissions and role guard review helpers for safe page access matrix, trader/owner checks and self-checks
Firestore rules alignment review helpers: expected paths, runtime context and permission-denied diagnostics without writes
Customer purchase full smoke helpers: read-only checks for catalog, cart, linked customer context and required purchase functions
Trader daily workflow smoke helpers: read-only checks for orders, invoices, payments, statements, returns and schedules functions
Android native features smoke helpers: safe diagnostics for HesabiAndroid bridge, APK version, cache, barcode, OCR and badge methods
APK update/version final check helpers for runtime, android-update metadata and native installed-version diagnostics
Production release candidate aggregator for critical read-only smoke checks and readiness snapshot
Customer catalog bug-fix diagnostics for cart validity, search consistency and layout overlap risk without writes
Payments/statements real-data consistency diagnostics for approved payments, invoices, ledger and balances without writes
محرك العرض والتنقل وتهيئة الحساب والربط والصفحات العامة
شراء العميل والكتالوج والسلة ونموذج الطلب مع تفويض آمن لوحدة الكتالوج
صفحات الأصناف والعملاء والطلبات والفواتير والجداول الأساسية
استقرار تسجيل الدخول والطلب واعتماد التاجر مع تفويض آمن لحسابات التقارير والسداد
السداد والفواتير والمرتجعات والأقساط والسياسات
الإعدادات والمالك والأصناف والأسعار والمخزون مع تفويض آمن لمساعدات الإعدادات والرسائل
Runtime safety aliases for missing critical functions
